title: Thai-Style Fish Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish infused with the bold flavors of Thai cuisine, featuring fish as the main protein.

ingredients.name: Fish (white fish such as cod or tilapia)

instructions: Heat 2 tsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the Thai Red Curry Paste and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add the Fish and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side until cooked through.
Add the Turkish Pilaf Rice Mix to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the Coconut Milk, Fish Sauce, and 1 cup of water to the pan.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Stir in chopped cilantro and serve hot.
Serve the Fish on top of the pilaf.
